message: Installer: prefer sysmon-go binary with bash fallback

 # Colorful, low-dependency TUI with live + historical hogs, per-core bars,

     cgroup_json+=$(printf '{"cgroup":"%s","cpu":%.1f}' "$name" "$cpu")
   done < <(
@@ -946,9 +942,11 @@ print_top_cpu(){ printf "%sTop CPU (live)%s  comm pid ni cpu mem
 "; }
 
 print_throttled(){
-  printf "%sThrottled (nice>0, live)%s\n" "$(c 2)" "$(r)"
+  printf "%sThrottled (nice>0, live)%s
+" "$(c 2)" "$(r)"
   ps -eo pid,ni,%cpu,%mem,comm --sort=-ni --no-headers \
-    | awk '$2>0 {comm=$5; for(i=6;i<=NF;i++) comm=comm" "$i; printf "%-18s %-6s NI:%3s CPU:%5s%% MEM:%5s%%\n", comm, $1, $2, $3, $4; if(++c==8) exit}'
+    | awk '$2>0 {comm=$5; for(i=6;i<=NF;i++) comm=comm" "$i; printf "%-18s %-6s NI:%3s CPU:%5s%% MEM:%5s%%
+", comm, $1, $2, $3, $4; if(++c==8) exit}'
 }
 
 print_historical(){ printf "
@@ -1022,7 +1020,8 @@ prev_total=""; prev_idle=""; json_warmup=0; adapt_interval_if_needed
 
 while true; do
 snapshot=$(ps -eo pid,ni,pcpu,pmem,comm --sort=-pcpu --no-headers \
-  | awk 'NR<=8 {comm=$5; for(i=6;i<=NF;i++) comm=comm" "$i; printf "%s|%s|%s|%s|%s\n",$1,$2,$3,$4,comm}')
+  | awk 'NR<=8 {comm=$5; for(i=6;i<=NF;i++) comm=comm" "$i; printf "%s|%s|%s|%s|%s

   view="$snapshot"
 
   while IFS='|' read -r pid ni cpu mem comm; do
@@ -1038,12 +1037,18 @@ snapshot=$(ps -eo pid,ni,pcpu,pmem,comm --sort=-pcpu --no-headers \
 
   if [ "$json_mode" != "1" ]; then
     clear 2>/dev/null || true
-    printf "%s%sSYSTEM RESOURCE MONITOR%s\n" "$(b)" "$(c 6)" "$(r)"
-    printf "%s%(%a %b %d %H:%M:%S %Z %Y)T%s\n" "$(b)" -1 "$(r)"

+    printf "%s%sSYSTEM RESOURCE MONITOR%s
+" "$(b)" "$(c 6)" "$(r)"

+" "$(b)" -1 "$(r)"
+    collect_battery; [ -n "$batt_txt" ] && printf "%s
+" "$batt_txt"
     disk_net_lines; print_io_net
-    collect_gpu; [ -n "$gpu_txt" ] && printf "%s\n\n" "$gpu_txt"
-    cpu_line; mem_line; collect_cgroups; printf "\n"
+    collect_gpu; [ -n "$gpu_txt" ] && printf "%s
+
+" "$gpu_txt"

+"
 
     if [ -n "$focus_re" ]; then
       focus_view=$(echo "$snapshot" | grep -E "$focus_re" || true)
@@ -1070,7 +1075,7 @@ snapshot=$(ps -eo pid,ni,pcpu,pmem,comm --sort=-pcpu --no-headers \
 
   if [ "$json_mode" = "1" ]; then
     if [ $json_warmup -eq 0 ]; then json_warmup=1; sleep "$interval"; continue; fi
-    esc(){ printf '%s' "$1" | sed 's/\\\\/\\\\\\\\/g; s/\"/\\\\\"/g'; }
+    esc(){ printf '%s' "$1" | sed 's/\\/\\\\/g; s/\"/\\\"/g'; }
   top_json="["; tf=1
   while IFS='|' read -r pid ni cpu mem comm; do
     [ -n "$comm" ] || continue
@@ -1137,9 +1142,36 @@ snapshot=$(ps -eo pid,ni,pcpu,pmem,comm --sort=-pcpu --no-headers \
   sleep "$sleep_time"
 done
 EOF
-    sudo chmod +x "$sysmon"
+        sudo chmod +x "$sysmon_path"
+        print_success "Legacy bash sysmon installed"
+    }
+
+# --- sysmon ------------------------------------------------
+    local sysmon="/usr/local/bin/sysmon"
+    local sysmon_go="/usr/local/bin/sysmon-go"
+    local latest_bin_url="https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/system_resource_protection_script/releases/latest/download/sysmon-linux-amd64"
+
+    if [ "$DRY_RUN" -eq 1 ]; then
+        print_info "[plan mode] Would download sysmon-go binary to $sysmon_go and link $sysmon; fallback to bash sysmon if download fails"
+    else
+        tmpbin=$(mktemp)
+        if curl -fsSL "$latest_bin_url" -o "$tmpbin"; then
+            sudo install -m 0755 "$tmpbin" "$sysmon_go"
+            sudo ln -sf "$sysmon_go" "$sysmon"
+            print_success "Installed sysmon-go binary (linked as sysmon)"
+        else
+            print_warning "Failed to download sysmon-go; installing legacy bash sysmon instead"
+            install_bash_sysmon "$sysmon"
+        fi
+        rm -f "$tmpbin"
+    fi
+
+    # Always ensure legacy bash sysmon is available as fallback
+    if [ ! -x "$sysmon" ] || ! sudo grep -q "system_resource_protection_script" "$sysmon" 2>/dev/null; then
+        install_bash_sysmon "$sysmon"
+    fi
 
-    # --- check-throttled --------------------------------------
+# --- check-throttled --------------------------------------
     local check_throttled="/usr/local/bin/check-throttled"
     if sudo test -f "$check_throttled" 2>/dev/null && ! sudo grep -q "system_resource_protection_script" "$check_throttled" 2>/dev/null; then
         print_info "Backing up existing $check_throttled to ${check_throttled}.srps-backup"

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# Legacy bash sysmon used as fallback when Go binary is unavailable.
+# Generated by system_resource_protection_script
+# (content identical to previous embedded sysmon)
+set -euo pipefail
+
+# NOTE: This is a stub placeholder. The full legacy content remains embedded
+# in install.sh via install_bash_sysmon.
